batch_summary: Joey is furious with Chandler for kissing his girlfriend and repeatedly hangs up on his apology calls, even when Chandler tries to trick him. Ross tries to intervene, but Joey shuts him down too. Later, at Monica's apartment, a defeated Chandler joins the group (Monica, Phoebe, Ross, and Rachel) as they prepare for Thanksgiving. Chandler laments his failed eight-hour attempt to reconcile with Joey. Meanwhile, Phoebe suggests a Secret Santa exchange to save money for her and Monica's new business.
cumulative_summary: Tension runs high between Joey and Chandler after Chandler kisses Joey's girlfriend. Sitting in his apartment, Joey repeatedly hangs up on Chandler's desperate phone calls. Chandler even tries to trick Joey by posing as a radio host offering a cash prize, but Joey slams the phone down the moment Chandler asks for the name of his "very sorry roommate." When Ross calls to intervene on Chandler's behalf, Joey shuts him down as well. Later, Chandler joins Monica, Phoebe, Ross, and Rachel at Monica's apartment as they prepare for Thanksgiving. Exhausted and defeated, Chandler admits that his relationship with Joey couldn't be worse after spending eight hours trying to apologize. As the group discusses holiday plans, Rachel jokes about office-stolen gifts, and Phoebe suggests they do a Secret Santa exchange to help her and Monica save money as they launch their new business.

batch_summary: As the friends draw names for Secret Santa, Joey tries to leave upon seeing Chandler but is persuaded to stay. Joey jokingly claims he invented Secret Santa and the movie Die Hard, prompting playful teasing. Later, Chandler asks to trade names to get Rachel. Phoebe eagerly agrees, explaining that Rachel returns every gift she receives. Chandler is shocked to realize Rachel lied about a dog stealing a backpack he once bought her, which she had actually returned.
cumulative_summary: Tension runs high between Joey and Chandler after Chandler kisses Joey's girlfriend. Joey repeatedly avoids Chandler's apologies and even shuts down Ross's attempts to intervene. Despite the lingering awkwardness, the friends share some lighthearted banter over Joey's absurd claims of inventing the game. Later, Chandler asks to trade names so he can get Rachel. Phoebe eagerly agrees, revealing that Rachel notoriously returns every gift she receives. This revelation leaves Chandler stunned as he realizes Rachel lied about a wild dog stealing a backpack he once bought her, which she had actually exchanged.

batch_summary: While discussing a briefcase Chandler bought, Thanksgiving preparations take a painful turn when Monica injures her eye with ice from a stuck freezer. Reluctant to visit her eye doctor because he is her ex-boyfriend, Richard, Monica is relieved when Phoebe calls and learns Richard is out of town. Phoebe quickly schedules an appointment for Monica with the on-call doctor instead, while Chandler takes advantage of Joey and Ross's absence to watch the Thanksgiving parade.

batch_summary: Ross visits Joey, who is packing up the guilt-gifts Chandler bought him. Ross tries to mediate, but Joey declares Chandler is no longer his best friend, offering the vacant title to Ross instead. Ross accepts and immediately uses his new influence to convince Joey to talk to Chandler. Meanwhile, at the coffee shop, Chandler reassures a guilty Kathy about the situation, but their intimate moment is interrupted when Joey walks in and spots them kissing.

batch_summary: Joey prepares to move out, deeply hurt by Chandler's betrayal of their friendship. When Chandler desperately asks how he can make amends, recalling how Joey was trapped in their entertainment unit during a robbery, Joey suggests a unique punishment: Chandler must lock himself inside a large wooden crate. Meanwhile, at the eye clinic, Monica flirts with her handsome doctor, Timothy Burke. Timothy diagnoses Monica with a scratched cornea, telling her she must wear an eye patch, which she playfully jokes makes her look like a pirate.
cumulative_summary: Following Chandler's betrayal with Kathy, a devastated Joey prepares to move out. batch_summary: During her eye exam, Monica and Timothy Burke share a flirtatious conversation. After addressing the elephant in the room—Timothy's father, Richard—Timothy reveals he recently broke up with his girlfriend because she wasn't ready for a commitment. Seizing the opportunity, Monica tries to keep the playful, pirate-themed banter going, but she awkwardly delivers a pirate joke before she is actually wearing her eye patch. Timothy points this out, leaving Monica frozen in hilarious embarrassment.
